channel.title: devsecops on Daniel-Andrei Minca
channel.description: Recent content in devsecops on Daniel-Andrei Minca

item.title: Interesting Tech Conferences '21
item.description: This is the 2nd year conferences are being virtual and we can only benefit from this. Some of time are free whilst some, more popular, require a small fee. The topics these conferences cover mostly relate to the SRE (Site Reliability Engineer) role and they cover topics like: Security & DevSecOps Observability Multicloud Enterprise IT Infrastructure Kubernetes GitOps CI/CD (Continous Integration/Continous Deployment/Delivery) Incomming this year PromCon Online ‘21 1 📅 Date: May 3

item.title: ZapCon 21
item.description: ZapCon ‘21 was scheduled on 9th March 2021 What was interesting Robot Framework Democratizing ZAP with test automation and DSLs by Abhay Bhargav BDD (Behaviour Driven Development) in IT-Security apparently, there’s this robotframework which makes writing test cases in quite a simple way, and you can run pentests on your UI application Why using a DAST scanner? DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing) keeps app secure:

item.title: Security Tools
item.description: I never had the chance to compact a list of available Security tools in Q1 2021, here it goes. If something’s missing from this list, anyone can freely open a PR and I’ll gladly update the list. Security tooling available By attending the ZapCon ‘21, I’ve received a feedback request email from them where I should list security tools I’ve used in the past. Name Pricing model checkmarx.
